summary: Verified all 3 bug fixes on mobile viewport (390x844). All issues reported by user are now resolved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 user-reported bugs have been verified as fixed: 1) Fresh Pet Meals on /dine now shows single column (grid-cols-1) on mobile - cards are vertically stacked with full width, 2) Mira AI quick action tabs (Meal Plan, Order Food, Special Diet) now click and immediately send messages - the race condition fix using sendMessage(action) directly works correctly, 3) Mira AI product cards are now larger with w-28 class (was w-20) and h-16 images (was h-12). Product cards in messages use w-16 h-16 images (was w-14 h-14).

fresh_pet_meals_grid.description: Fresh Pet Meals section on /dine page now displays as single column (1x1) on mobile
fresh_pet_meals_grid.verification: Grid has class 'grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2' - cards are vertically stacked at x=16 with width=358px

mira_quick_action_tabs.description: Mira AI quick action tabs (Meal Plan, Order Food, Special Diet) now click and auto-send message
mira_quick_action_tabs.verification: Clicking 'Meal Plan' immediately sends message and receives response from Mira

mira_product_card_sizes.description: Mira AI product cards are now larger
mira_product_card_sizes.verification: Product cards in 'For [Pet]' section use w-28 (was w-20) with h-16 images (was h-12). Product cards in messages use w-16 h-16 images (was w-14 h-14)

test_screenshots: .screenshots/dine_fresh_meals_mobile.png - Shows Fresh Pet Meals as single column
.screenshots/mira_chat_widget.png - Shows Mira chat with quick action tabs
.screenshots/mira_after_quick_action.png - Shows message sent after clicking Meal Plan
.screenshots/mira_products_requested.png - Shows product cards with larger sizes
